title: Backend Developer Roadmap
description: Your guide to becoming a backend developer. This roadmap covers languages, databases, APIs, and deployment practices essential for server-side development.

stages.title: Internet & Operating Systems
stages.description: Understand the environment your code runs in.

modules.title: Internet Basics
modules.description: Recap HTTP, HTTPS, and networking fundamentals.

modules.title: Terminal Usage
modules.description: Get comfortable with the command line (bash/zsh).

modules.title: OS Concepts
modules.description: Learn about processes, threads, memory management, and I/O.

stages.title: Choose a Language
stages.description: Select a primary language for backend development.

modules.title: Python
modules.description: Versatile language with frameworks like Django and Flask.

modules.title: Java
modules.description: Enterprise-grade language with the Spring framework.

stages.title: Databases
stages.description: Learn how to store and retrieve data.

modules.title: Relational Databases (SQL)
modules.description: Learn PostgreSQL or MySQL. Understand normalization, transactions, and SQL queries.

modules.title: NoSQL Databases
modules.description: Explore MongoDB or Redis. Understand their use cases.

modules.title: ORMs
modules.description: Learn about Object-Relational Mapping libraries like Prisma, TypeORM, or SQLAlchemy.

stages.title: APIs
stages.description: Learn to create interfaces for your services.

modules.title: Authentication
modules.description: Implement authentication using JWT, OAuth, or session cookies.

modules.title: GraphQL
modules.description: A query language for your API.

stages.title: DevOps & Deployment
stages.description: Get your code running in production.

modules.title: CI/CD
modules.description: Set up continuous integration and deployment pipelines with GitHub Actions.

modules.title: Cloud Providers
modules.description: Get familiar with AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
